text: LLM-judged reconciliation for ambiguous open aims
description: Third/optional heuristic for 7625d5e6: for open aims that the cheap signals (commit-reference 6606def4, code-presence da1291e5) flag as ambiguous, run an LLM check of the aim's described work against the relevant code/tree/diff to judge implemented vs not, with a short rationale. Highest accuracy, highest cost — gate it behind the cheap heuristics so it only runs on a small candidate set. Output stays a human-review suggestion, never auto-marks done.

status.comment: Final-accuracy layer, gated behind the cheap heuristics to bound cost.
